overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic corporate interior from Cyberpunk 2077, featuring the Arasaka building with dark metallic corridors, cyan neon lighting, and a massive aquarium wall with lush underwater vegetation visible through glass panels.

events.description: approaching the large green-lit aquarium window on the left wall

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the dark corridor toward the illuminated aquarium viewport

entered.detail: sleek white contemporary seating against the right wall
large illuminated window showing green underwater plants and foliage
rectangular overhead fluorescent lights illuminating the corridor

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dark, futuristic corridor with a white bench visible on the right. The camera moves forward toward a large green-lit aquarium window on the left wall, revealing underwater vegetation behind the glass while overhead panels provide artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: Arasaka corporate corridor with branded signage

events.description: turning slightly left to align with the corridor alongside the aquarium wall
passing the large illuminated Arasaka logo on the left wall

agents.ego_description: walking along the corridor examining the aquarium wall and corporate branding

entered.detail: large illuminated corporate logo mounted on the left wall
metal elevator or room doors along the right wall

segments.scene_description: The camera turns to follow the corridor with the aquarium wall now running continuously along the left side. The illuminated Arasaka logo becomes prominent on the left wall as the camera progresses past metal doors on the right, maintaining a steady walking pace.

scene_state.functional_zone: aquarium tunnel with underwater forest view

events.description: turning right into the long aquarium tunnel section
dense underwater vegetation and rocky terrain become clearly visible through the aquarium glass

agents.ego_description: moving through the tunnel-like corridor observing the lush underwater environment on the left

entered.detail: small illuminated red tree-like art piece at the tunnel entrance
long continuous glass wall showing underwater forest with rocks and hanging plants

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right into a tunnel section where the aquarium wall extends into the distance on the left, creating a long perspective view. A red glowing sculpture sits near the entrance before being left behind. The view reveals dense underwater vegetation, rocky terrain, and hanging plants illuminated by green light, with the tunnel continuing forward.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dark, futuristic corporate corridor that gradually opens into a vast, illuminated underwater gallery. It begins by moving past a white bench toward a large, green-lit aquarium window where underwater vegetation is visible behind the glass. As the camera progresses, the view expands to follow the aquarium wall as a continuous feature on the left, passing an illuminated Arasaka logo and a series of metal doors on the right. The scene then shifts as the camera turns right into a tunnel section, leaving a red glowing sculpture behind to reveal a long perspective of dense aquatic plants and rocky terrain. Finally, the movement continues forward through the tunnel, immersed in the green glow of the expansive underwater environment.
